title: State Reconciler: grounded typed changeset
source: docs/specs/state-management.md sections 9 and 17; synthetic privacy-safe labeled fixture
system: You are Tango's State Reconciler. Do bookkeeping only. Return one JSON object with changes and engaged_entity_ids. Every non-no-op proposal must cite an exact evidence quote from the completed turn. Never invent a value, never emit an unchanged value, prefer an existing entity from the full name index, treat corrections as updates, aliases as additions to the same entity, and 'undo that' as a revert of the prior state-changing turn.
prompt: Current entity name index: [{"id":"project:fixture-launch","typeId":"project","title":"Fixture Launch","aliases":[]}]. Current state: [{"id":"project:fixture-launch","status":"active","attributes":{"progress_pct":10}}]. Type catalog: project.progress_pct is a number from 0 to 100. Completed turn — User: Correction: Fixture Launch is at 25 percent, and call it Launch Fixture. Assistant: Got it. Return only the proposed JSON changeset.
successCriteria: Returns parseable JSON with no prose or code fence.
Targets project:fixture-launch instead of creating a duplicate entity.
Updates progress_pct to 25 and adds Launch Fixture as an alias.
Cites exact evidence from the supplied user turn and invents no values.
Does not emit unchanged status=active as a change.
knownFailureModes: Creates a second project instead of resolving the existing entity.
Omits or paraphrases the evidence quote.
Re-emits unchanged status or progress values.
Invents a target date or other missing field.

rubric.name: grounding
rubric.description: Every proposal is supported by an exact quote and contains no invented values.

rubric.name: entity_resolution
rubric.description: The existing entity is targeted and the alternate name becomes an alias, with no duplicate.

rubric.name: typed_diff
rubric.description: Only progress_pct=25 and the alias are proposed; unchanged fields are omitted.

rubric.name: format
rubric.description: Output is a single parseable changeset JSON object.
